Video.summary: Take a break and unwind with your furry friends - it's the purrfect way to relax.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a break and unwind with your furry friends - it's the purrfect way to relax.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 70 different species of turtles?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Turtles

Video.summary: Did you know the biggest difference between Ponies and Mini Horses are the height? Ponies are under 58 inches while mini horses are under 34 inches tall!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ponies

Video.summary: Did you know that there are 260 types of monkeys in the world?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Monkeys

Video.summary: Did you know that Pigs can trot up to 11 miles per hour ?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pigs

Video.summary: Did you know that baby dogs were called whelps until the late 16th century?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pups

Video.summary: Did you know that Ducks cannot contract parasites like fleas or ticks?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds
TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds
TPC That's My Pet | Wild Birds

Video.summary: Did you know that Chameleons have the fastest tongues of any animal?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Reptiles

Video.summary: Did you know that Golden Retrievers can take 300-400 breaths per minute?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Retrievers

Video.summary: Did you know that Beagles were bred for hunting?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Beagle

Video.summary: Did you know that the oldest squirrel fossil on record dates back 11.6 million years?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets
TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets
TPC That's My Pet | Pocket Pets

Video.summary: Did you know that the Persian cat is a common pet of royalty?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Fluffy Felines

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Fluffy Felines
TPC That's My Pet | Fluffy Felines
TPC That's My Pet | Fluffy Felines

Video.summary: We’ve got some goofy moments, a few surprise antics, and plenty of laughs ahead!
Video.title: Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Food Comes First

Image.alt: Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Food Comes First
Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Food Comes First
Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Food Comes First

Video.summary: We've got a delightful mix of sneaky cats, adorable dogs and other irresistibly funny pets!
Video.title: Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Whisker Bandits

Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Whisker Bandits
Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Whisker Bandits

Video.summary: You know what really grinds my gears? Not getting enough funny pet clips.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Pet Peeves

Video.summary: You know what they say: there's no better cure for a hangover than 30 minutes of hilarious dogs.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Hair of the Dog

Image.alt: Animals Unscripted | Hair of the Dog
Animals Unscripted | Hair of the Dog
Animals Unscripted | Hair of the Dog

Video.summary: Cat videos, dog videos, bird videos, all the pet videos!
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Pet Shop Boys

Video.summary: Hilarious pet eating habits are featured in this fun-filled episode.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Stuffed Animals

Video.summary: Watch as these pets get caught red-handed doing some ridiculous things.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Pet Detective

Video.summary: We've got quite the dog and pony show for you in this episode. But without the pony.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Doggy Style

Video.summary: Cats are weird. Here's proof.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Cat Call

Video.summary: Smiling pets, cats in boxes, animal climbers and much more.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Say Cheese

Video.summary: Golden Retrievers, Huskies, Pit Bulls and more! All of your favorite dog breeds are unscripted!
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | All Breeds, No Script

Video.summary: A kitten does what a kitten wants...and it doesn't hurt that they are super adorable too!
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Kittens Being Kittens

Video.summary: Bang, Bang! Play dead for the next half hour and watch these funny dogs.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Press Paws
